panels.title: CSA Loom resources (Azure Resource Graph)
panels.description: Live count of every Azure resource in the rg-csa-loom-* resource groups across the estate.

azureResourceGraph.query: Resources | where resourceGroup startswith 'rg-csa-loom-' | summarize count()

panels.title: Resources by type
panels.description: Distribution of CSA Loom resources by Azure resource type — governance inventory at a glance.

azureResourceGraph.query: Resources | where resourceGroup startswith 'rg-csa-loom-' | summarize Count=count() by type | order by Count desc

panels.title: Resources by resource group
panels.description: CSA Loom resource counts per resource group (admin + DLZ planes).

azureResourceGraph.query: Resources | where resourceGroup startswith 'rg-csa-loom-' | summarize Resources=count() by resourceGroup, subscriptionId | order by Resources desc

panels.title: Governance activity — admin / RBAC / policy writes
panels.description: AzureActivity write & action operations on CSA Loom resources (role assignments, policy, deployments) from Log Analytics.

azureLogAnalytics.query: AzureActivity | where OperationNameValue has_any ('roleAssignments','policyAssignments','deployments','providers/Microsoft.Authorization') or CategoryValue == 'Administrative' | summarize Operations=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), CategoryValue | order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Recent administrative operations
panels.description: Most recent administrative (governance) operations across the CSA Loom estate — who did what.

azureLogAnalytics.query: AzureActivity | where CategoryValue == 'Administrative' | project TimeGenerated, OperationNameValue, Caller, ActivityStatusValue, _ResourceId | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 50
